combined_text: What does Fowler mean? "What does Fowler mean? Fowler as a boys' name is of Old English origin, and the meaning of Fowler is ""bird trapper"". Occupational name. Also form of Falco. ENDS WITH -er ASSOCIATED WITH old english, bird, trapper (hunter), occupational Variations CREATIVE FORMS (male) (female)MIDDLE NAME PAIRINGS
